title: Vetted Feedback Curation and Reference Dataset Build

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementation kickoff: building vetted-feedback reference dataset flow end-to-end (shared voting engine, contradictions/aligned report modes, direct CLI+MCP dataset builder from explicit feedback IDs, aligned-mode UI dataset action, and docs). No fallback paths.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Epic completion update: all scoped tasks for shared voting extraction, contradictions/aligned mode outputs, direct vetted-feedback dataset builder (CLI+MCP), dashboard aligned-mode action/API route, and docs are now delivered and validated with targeted tests.
